source_pr.title: planner: fix tiflash path will be identified as table dual
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/49285

Problem Summary:

### What changed and how does it work?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
planner: fix tiflash path will be identified as table dual
```

symptoms: EXPLAIN output for a `READ_FROM_STORAGE(TIFLASH[...])` query could unexpectedly use `TableDual`/non-TiFlash access paths, breaking the golden plan assertions in the enforce_mpp tests.
failure_signature: TiFlash access path can be incorrectly identified/pruned as `TableDual` in EXPLAIN, causing unstable golden plans (Issue #49285).
root_cause_explanation: The enforce_mpp tests assert exact EXPLAIN output for TiFlash-related plans. A planner bug could incorrectly treat a TiFlash access path as `TableDual` (or prune it), leading to different plans and golden mismatches. The fix ensures TiFlash paths are built/kept when the query prefers TiFlash (e.g., via `read_from_storage(tiflash)`), making the EXPLAIN output deterministic for the test.
fix_pattern: Fix planner path-building/heuristics so TiFlash access paths are not mis-identified as `TableDual`, stabilizing EXPLAIN output for golden tests.

evidence: evidence: TiFlash path can be identified as `TableDual` leading to unstable EXPLAIN/golden output (Issue #49285)

analysis:
PR title: planner: fix tiflash path will be identified as table dual
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/49338
Triage sources: manual_triage, explicit_flaky_signal
Triage summary: TiFlash path can be identified as `TableDual` leading to unstable EXPLAIN/golden output (Issue #49285)
Changed files (4): pkg/planner/core/casetest/enforcempp/enforce_mpp_test.go, pkg/planner/core/casetest/enforcempp/testdata/enforce_mpp_suite_in.json, pkg/planner/core/casetest/enforcempp/testdata/enforce_mpp_suite_out.json, pkg/planner/core/stats.go
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
